name: Sausage and Potatoes Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut sausage into bite-sized pieces.
2. Brown the sausage on all sides in a skillet, then drain.
3. In a bowl, combine soup, milk, onion, green pepper, pimiento, salt, and pepper to taste; mix well.
4. Layer half of the potatoes, sausage, and soup mixture in a 2-quart casserole.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake uncovered for an additional 10 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
Yield: 3-4 servings.
